title: senecio sabinjoensis
intro: Senecio sabinjoensis, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio sabinjoensis include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting digestive health. Senecio sabinjoensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
